briefdescription.para: Convert a byte array to a hexadecimal string.

parameterdescription.para: A vector of bytes to be converted.

simplesect.para: A hexadecimal string representation of the bytes.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the architecture is little endian.

simplesect.para: true if little endian, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Converts a little-endian byte vector into a number.

parameterdescription.para: uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, or supported multiprecision integer types.

briefdescription.para: Converts a number into a byte vector (little-endian).
Converts a hexadecimal ASCII char array into a number.

parameterdescription.para: How many nibbles will constitute a number

briefdescription.para: Converts a hexadecimal ASCII char array into a vector of numbers.

memberdef.definition: static std::enable_if_t< std::is_same_v< typename T::value_type, uint8_t > > sgns::AdjustEndianess
memberdef.argsstring: (T &data, std::optional< typename T::iterator > start=std::nullopt, std::optional< typename T::iterator > finish=std::nullopt)
memberdef.name: AdjustEndianess

parameterdescription.para: Optional beginning of the valid data
Optional ending of the valid data

detaileddescription.para:
Wait for a condition to become true with timeout
condition
a callable that returns bool, true when condition is met
timeout
maximum time to wait
actualDuration
optional pointer to store the actual wait duration
check_interval
time to wait between condition checks
true if condition became true before timeout, false if timeout occurred
